/CNES/Observatory/CDPP-Archive/Cluster-2.description: The Cluster-2 spacecraft, also known as Salsa, was launched from Baikonur on 2000 July 16 on the first of two Soyouz vehicules dedicated to the Cluster-II mission. It was the Flight Model 6, one of three spacecraft built following the failure of the first Cluster launch vehicule.

/CNES/Observatory/CDPP-Archive/Cluster-4.description: The Cluster-4 spacecraft, also known as Tango, was launched from Baikonur on 2000 August 08 on the second of two Soyouz vehicules dedicated to the Cluster-II mission. It was the Flight Model 8, one of three spacecraft built following the failure of the first Cluster launch vehicule.
